title: Chain Crafter
description: Allows you to craft chainamil armour using chains in Minecraft
body:
Chain crafter is a simple data pack that allows you to craft chainmail armour using chains!\
This adds the long-awaited recipe in the game!\
Craft the armour like normal armour, but the helmet and boots need to be in a specific place, look at the gallery for help if you need (This has been fixed in versions 0.3 and above).
